Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Supplemental Interrogatories (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions And Costs From Defendant Julia Daniel And Her Counsel Of Record In The Amount Of $1,310.00; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Jerome Bellotti
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiffs Nakarin Hammer and Navanida Rahultat's unopposed Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's Supplemental Interrogatories (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions And Costs From Defendant Julia Daniel And Her Counsel Of Record In The Amount Of $1,310.00 is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

DEMURRER to ANSWER to COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs NAKARIN HAMMER, and NAVANIDA RAHULTAT DEMURRER to ANSWER to COMPLAINT.

Off calendar for failure to provide courtesy copies. SF Local Rule 2.7B.
